name: Superman
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An alien orphan raised on a farm who protects Metropolis using flight, super strength, and laser vision.

name: Batman
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A billionaire tech-genius who fights crime in Gotham City using his detective intellect and martial arts after a tragic childhood loss.

name: Wonder Woman
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An Amazonian warrior princess who leaves her hidden island to bring justice and peace to the wider world.

name: The Joker
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A maniacal, green-haired criminal clown who acts as the chaotic antithesis to Gotham's dark protector.

name: The Flash
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A forensic scientist granted near-infinite kinetic velocity after a laboratory lightning strike.

name: Green Lantern
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A fearless test pilot given a cosmic ring that converts willpower into solid green energy constructs.

name: Aquaman
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: The half-human King of Atlantis who commands marine biology and wields a powerful royal trident.

name: Harley Quinn
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A former asylum psychiatrist turned acrobatic criminal who escaped a toxic clown romance to carve out her own path.

name: Nightwing
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: The original acrobat partner of the Dark Knight who stepped out of the shadow to protect Bludhaven on his own.

name: Robin
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A brilliant young detective who deduced the Dark Knight's true identity to become his tactical sidekick.

name: Red Hood
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A resurrected former sidekick who uses lethal firearm tactics to clean up crime from the underground up.

name: Catwoman
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: Gotham's premier whip-wielding cat-burglar who constantly blurs the lines between criminal and hero.

name: Shazam
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An orphaned boy who transforms into an adult magical god with lightning powers by shouting a specific phrase.

name: Black Adam
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An ancient, ruthless anti-hero ruler possessing divine Egyptian magical capabilities.

name: Green Arrow
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A billionaire castaway who refined pinpoint archery skills to target institutional corruption.

name: Cyborg
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A high school athlete rebuilt into a living technological system utilizing alien hardware integrations.

name: Raven
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An atmospheric, dark empath who controls shadow magic while suppressing the influence of her demonic warlord father.

name: Beast Boy
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A green-skinned hero capable of morphing instantly into any biological animal form.

name: Starfire
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An alien warrior princess who escaped off-world captivity to protect Earth using energy bolt manipulation.

name: Supergirl
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: The elder cousin of the Man of Steel who arrived late on Earth with the exact same solar-powered capabilities.

name: Batgirl
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: The police commissioner's brilliant daughter who uses tech prowess and martial arts to protect the city.

name: Darkseid
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: The brutal New God ruler of a hellish industrial planet seeking a cosmic equation to wipe out free will.

name: Deathstroke
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A ruthless tactical mercenary with enhanced mental processing and weapon capabilities.

name: Lex Luthor
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A brilliant, billionaire industrialist who views the world's greatest alien protector as an existential hazard to humanity.

name: Brainiac
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A cold cybernetic collector who shrinks and bottles alien planetary cities before deleting the original worlds.

name: The Riddler
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A narcissistic criminal mastermind obsessed with staging complex puzzles and word games to prove his intelligence.

name: Penguin
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An umbrella-wielding, eccentric mobster boss who operates a high-end underworld casino lounge.

name: Two-Face
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A scarred former district attorney who leaves every life-or-death decision up to the flip of a double-sided coin.

name: Bane
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A brilliant tactical mastermind who uses an performance drug called Venom to physically overpower the Bat.

name: Poison Ivy
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A botanist turned eco-terrorist who uses toxins and mind-controlling pheromones to protect plant biology.

name: Scarecrow
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A disgraced psychologist who weaponizes a specialized toxin to inflict terrifying phobias on his targets.

name: Martian Manhunter
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: The last green Martian on Earth possessing shapeshifting, telepathy, and an intense vulnerability to fire.

name: John Constantine
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A cynical, trench-coat wearing occult detective who tricks demons and sorcerers using sharp wit and street magic.

name: Zatanna
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A charismatic stage illusionist who casts genuine reality-altering spells by speaking her commands completely backward.

name: Swamp Thing
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An elemental plant monstrosity housing the consciousness of a scientist that monitors global plant life.

name: Black Canary
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: An elite street brawler who unleashes a high-frequency acoustic scream capable of shattering reinforced steel.

name: Hawkman
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A reincarnated Egyptian prince who utilizes alien gravity-defying metal wings and an old mace.

name: Doctor Fate
hints: From: Comics (DC)
About: A mortal host controlled by an ancient cosmic entity when wearing a golden helm of absolute order.

name: Spider-Man
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A science student given wall-crawling capabilities by a radioactive insect, living by a strict code of responsibility.

name: Iron Man
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A tech billionaire who escaped captivity by forging an armored combat suit with an integrated chest reactor.

name: Captain America
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A frail war recruit enhanced by an experimental serum who carries an unbreakable round vibranium shield.

name: Thor
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: The divine prince of a cosmic realm who channels thunderbolts using a heavy, selective hammer.

name: The Hulk
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A brilliant nuclear scientist who converts into a colossal, green rage monster when under high stress.

name: Black Widow
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: An elite former foreign intelligence agent trained in stealth mechanics and close combat.

name: Wolverine
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A gruff mutant tracker with a rapid cellular recovery factor and extendable metal claws in his hands.

name: Deadpool
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A chatty, self-aware mercenary who constantly references the fact that he is inside a media project.

name: Doctor Strange
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A premier neural surgeon who mastered mystical arts to defend reality from extradimensional entities.

name: Black Panther
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: The royal leader of an isolationist, high-tech African territory who uses a kinetic-absorbing feline suit.

name: Star-Lord
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A music-loving human space scavenger who leads a dysfunctional crew of galactic misfits.

name: Groot
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A humanoid tree entity capable of structural growth who communicates exclusively using a single repetitive phrase.

name: Rocket Raccoon
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A cynical, genetically engineered procyonid heavy weapons technician and tactical pilot.

name: Thanos
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A cosmic warlord who sought six fundamental singular relics to instantly reduce half of all living populations.

name: Loki
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A silver-tongued cosmic trickster deity who shifts appearances to manipulate global royal successions.

name: Scarlet Witch
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A mutant capable of casting probability hexes and harnessing chaotic magic to restructure physical realities.

name: Vision
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: An advanced artificial android operating with a cosmic jewel embedded in his forehead to control body density.

name: Hawkeye
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: An elite tactical agent with zero miss accuracy who utilizes a custom quiver of specialized trick arrows.

name: Falcon
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A military rescue specialist utilizing a experimental mechanical wing configuration to navigate combat.

name: Winter Soldier
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A brainwashed shadow operative fitted with a high-strength cybernetic arm extension.

name: Ant-Man
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A reformed thief who utilizes subatomic particles to dynamically adjust his mass from insect size to giant scale.

name: Captain Marvel
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: An air force pilot fused with alien energy signatures to unleash catastrophic cosmic energy blasts.

name: Venom
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A liquid alien entity that binds with a journalist host, displaying massive jaws and high vulnerability to sonic tones.

name: Carnage
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A chaotic red alien offspring that merged with a psychotic inmate to fashion blade constructs from limbs.

name: Green Goblin
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A corrupted chemical executive who flies on a glider deploying pumpkin explosives to terrorize New York.

name: Doctor Octopus
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A brilliant nuclear physicist fitted with four intelligent mechanical tentacle lines fused to his spine.

name: Magneto
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A powerful survivor who controls electromagnetic fields to protect mutant populations from human containment.

name: Professor X
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A powerful psychic mutant who operates an academy to foster peaceful integration between humans and mutants.

name: Cyclops
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A tactical mutant leader who must wear a specialized ruby-quartz visor to suppress constant optic force concussions.

name: Jean Grey
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A premier telepathic mutant who periodically serves as a host to a destructive cosmic entity.

name: Storm
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A mutant capable of generating flash blizzards, wind currents, and directed lightning blasts.

name: Rogue
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A mutant who absorbs the life force, memories, and tracking powers of anyone she makes skin contact with.

name: Gambit
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A smooth thief who infuses kinetic energy into throwing cards to make them explode on impact.

name: Daredevil
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A blind lawyer who utilizes enhanced radar senses to patrol the streets of Hell's Kitchen at night.

name: The Punisher
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A ruthless military veteran conducting a single-minded war on organized crime using heavy tactical firearms.

name: Kingpin
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A massive, white-suited crime boss who controls urban street operations through financial and physical leverage.

name: Moon Knight
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A mercenary dealing with identity splits who acts as an avatar of an ancient lunar deity.

name: Ghost Rider
hints: From: Comics (Marvel)
About: A stunt rider bound to a spirit of vengeance, taking the appearance of a flaming skull on a hellish motorcycle.

name: Hellboy
hints: From: Comics (Dark Horse)
About: A red-skinned demon summoned by Nazis who grows up to be a paranormal investigator for the Bureau for Paranormal Research and Defense.

name: Spawn
hints: From: Comics (Image)
About: A former CIA agent who makes a deal with Hell to become a Hellspawn, using his powers to fight against evil.

name: Invincible
hints: From: Comics (Image)
About: A young superhero who inherits incredible powers from his father, only to discover that his father's legacy is built on a lie.

name: Omni-Man
hints: From: Comics (Image)
About: The powerful Viltrumite father of Invincible, sent to conquer Earth under the guise of being a hero.

name: The Tick
hints: From: Comics (New England Comics)
About: A large, blue, nigh-invulnerable superhero who fights crime with absurd gusto and barely any understanding of reality.

name: Judge Dredd
hints: From: Comics (2000 AD)
About: A law enforcer in a dystopian future city where judges act as judge, jury, and executioner, never removing his helmet.

name: The Crow
hints: From: Comics (Caliber Comics)
About: A man resurrected from the dead by a mystical crow to avenge the murder of his fiancée and himself.

name: Rorschach
hints: From: Comics (Watchmen)
About: A masked vigilante who operates outside the law, following a strict black-and-white moral code, never compromising.

name: Doctor Manhattan
hints: From: Comics (Watchmen)
About: A being of godlike power created by a science accident, who perceives all time simultaneously and becomes increasingly detached from humanity.

name: V
hints: From: Comics (V for Vendetta)
About: A masked anarchist who wages a campaign to overthrow a fascist government, using the date of a failed Catholic plot as his symbol.
